message:
fix: batch consecutive setState calls to prevent UI flicker (#3739) (#3745)

Consolidate separate useState variables into single state objects in
ClusterGroups and RenameModal to eliminate consecutive setState calls
that can cause intermediate re-renders and visual flicker.

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
